title: Database Maintenance Tasks Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on essential database maintenance tasks.

questions.question: Which of these is the most important database maintenance task?
options: Updating the database server every hour

questions.question: Over time, database indexes can become _______, leading to slower query performance.
What is the primary role of database monitoring and profiling?
options: To find and optimize slow-running queries

questions.question: Regarding database security, what is an important maintenance task?
options: Applying the latest security patches to the database server
Periodically reviewing and updating access permissions
Ensuring that the database isn't accessible from the internet
